message:
feat(choreography): add projection compiler with code generation (bd-1f8jn.2)

Implements the choreographic projection compiler that takes a global protocol,
validates it, projects to per-participant local types, and generates Rust code
including session type aliases, message structs, and async handler skeletons.
Includes CALM monotonicity annotation propagation for saga optimization.

18 new tests (45 total in choreography module). 6532 lib tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
